channel.title: Webgl on The Mize Collection
channel.description: Recent content in Webgl on The Mize Collection

item.title: WebGL
item.description:
How awesome would be if we could controler the powerful GPU from the browser using JavaScript? Well, we can with WebGL.

The WebGL is a subset of OpenGL, specifically the ES 2.0. It has limitation if we compare with modern OpenGL, but it is still a powerful API.

Canvas and WebGL Context

The <canvas> element is the HTML element that we need to use to access the WebGL context.

The WebGL context is the object that we will use define programs, shaders, buffers, etc.
